task: F008 System screens: build iOS Access Denied (403) and Not Found (404) static screens and wire go_router errorBuilder + /access-denied with auth-aware CTAs.
acceptanceCriteria: not found screen renders on an unknown route via the go_router errorBuilder
access denied screen renders at the /access-denied route
cta is auth aware: logged in goes home, logged out goes login
flutter analyze clean and the full test suite green
